query:
SELECT 
  gameId, side, pitcherName, pitcherHand, mlbamId,
  kProj, kLine, kPer9, kMedian,
  bookLine, bookOverOdds, bookUnderOdds,
  pOver, pUnder, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  edgeOver, edgeUnder, verdict, bestSide, bestEdge, bestMlStr
FROM mlb_strikeout_props
WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009)
ORDER BY gameId, side;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

  edgeOver, edgeUnder, verdict, bestSide, bestEdge, bestMlStr
FROM mlb_strikeout_props
WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009)
ORDER BY gameId, side;
